business.name: Munoz Pest Control
business.tagline: Your trusted Dallas pest control experts delivering safe, effective solutions for home and business.
business.hours: Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat 9:00 AM - 2:00 PM

seo.title: Munoz Pest Control | Expert Pest Control in Dallas, TX | Free Estimates
seo.description: Munoz Pest Control provides professional pest control services in Dallas, TX. From ants to rodents, we eliminate pests safely. Call (469) 402-6498 for a free estimate.

hero.headline: Protect Your Home from Unwanted Pests
hero.subheadline: Safe, effective, and affordable pest control solutions tailored to your needs.

featureSections.title: Full-Service Pest Control for Dallas Homes
featureSections.body: We tackle everything from ants and roaches to termites and rodents. Our integrated pest management approach ensures long-term results with minimal environmental impact.
bullets: Eco-friendly treatments safe for kids and pets
featureSections.cardBody: Our thorough inspections and targeted treatments mean you can relax knowing your home is protected.

featureSections.title: Advanced Techniques for Lasting Control
featureSections.body: We use the latest pest control technology and methods to eliminate pests at the source. Our technicians are trained and certified to handle even the toughest infestations.
featureSections.cardBody: If pests return between treatments, we'll come back at no extra charge.

whyChooseUs.title: Local Expertise
whyChooseUs.description: We know Dallas pests inside and out, from fire ants to German roaches.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Response
whyChooseUs.description: Most infestations can't wait. We offer prompt scheduling and same-day service.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No hidden fees, no surprises. You'll know the cost upfront before any work begins.

whyChooseUs.title: Eco-Conscious Solutions
whyChooseUs.description: We prioritize low-toxicity treatments that are safe for your family and the environment.

testimonials.quote: Munoz Pest Control saved our home from a major termite problem. They were professional, thorough, and the pricing was fair.
testimonials.author: Mark T.

testimonials.quote: We had roaches in our apartment and Munoz cleared them out in two visits. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Jessica L.

testimonials.quote: Our office had a rodent issue and they handled it discreetly and efficiently. Great communication throughout.
testimonials.author: David R.

cta.headline: Ready to Reclaim Your Home?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your free inspection today and get peace of mind.

servicesPage.intro: At Munoz Pest Control, we offer a full range of pest management services designed to protect your property and health. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate and prevent infestations.

services.title: General Pest Control
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive treatment for common household pests like ants, roaches, spiders, and more.
services.longDescription: Our general pest control service targets the most common invaders in Dallas homes. We use a combination of interior and exterior treatments to eliminate existing pests and create a barrier that keeps them out. Monthly, bi-monthly, and quarterly plans available.
benefits: Eliminates ants, roaches, spiders, and silverfish
Low-odor treatments safe for daily life
Flexible scheduling to fit your routine
Ongoing monitoring and re-treatment if needed

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We thoroughly inspect your home to identify pest entry points and activity.

process.title: Treatment
process.description: We apply targeted treatments to affected areas and perimeter.

process.title: Prevention
process.description: We seal gaps and provide advice to prevent future infestations.

faqs.question: How often should I get pest control?
faqs.answer: We recommend quarterly treatments for most homes, but monthly or bi-monthly plans are available for high-risk areas.

faqs.question: Are your treatments safe for pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use pet-friendly products. We ask that you keep pets away during treatment and allow 30 minutes for drying.

services.title: Termite Control
services.shortDescription: Protect your largest investment from silent destroyers with advanced termite solutions.
services.longDescription: Termites cause billions in damage annually. Our termite control services include thorough inspections, liquid soil treatments, and baiting systems to eliminate colonies and prevent re-infestation. We provide warranties for your peace of mind.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We perform a detailed inspection using moisture meters and infrared tools.

process.title: Treatment
process.description: We apply a liquid barrier or install bait stations around your foundation.

process.title: Monitoring
process.description: We regularly check bait stations and retreat if activity is found.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment last?
faqs.answer: Liquid treatments can last 5-10 years, while bait systems require ongoing monitoring and refills.

faqs.question: Do you offer a termite warranty?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our termite treatments come with a renewable warranty that covers damage if termites return.

services.title: Bed Bug Treatment
services.shortDescription: Fast, effective bed bug elimination using heat and chemical treatments.
services.longDescription: Bed bugs are notoriously difficult to remove. We offer both chemical and heat treatments to eradicate bed bugs at all life stages. Our process includes preparation guidance, thorough treatment, and follow-up inspections to ensure complete removal.
benefits: Heat treatments kill bugs in one visit

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We use K-9 or thermal detection to locate all hiding spots.

process.title: Treatment
process.description: We apply heat or chemical treatment to infested areas.

process.title: Follow-up
process.description: We return in 2 weeks to confirm elimination and retreat if necessary.

faqs.question: Do I need to throw away my furniture?
faqs.answer: No, most furniture can be treated. We'll advise on preparation before treatment.

faqs.question: How long does heat treatment take?
faqs.answer: Typically 6-8 hours for a standard home, with immediate results.

services.title: Rodent Control
services.shortDescription: Humane and effective removal of rats and mice from your property.
services.longDescription: Rodents carry diseases and cause structural damage. Our rodent control program includes trapping, exclusion, and sanitation to rid your home of mice and rats. We seal entry points and provide ongoing monitoring to prevent re-entry.
benefits: Exclusion services to seal entry points

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We identify rodent activity, droppings, and entry points.

process.title: Exclusion
process.description: We seal gaps and holes with steel wool and caulk.

process.title: Trapping & Removal
process.description: We set traps and remove captured rodents.

faqs.question: How do you keep rodents from coming back?
faqs.answer: We seal all entry points and recommend ongoing monitoring and sanitation.

faqs.question: Is rodent poison safe for pets?
faqs.answer: We avoid poisons in homes with pets. Instead, we use mechanical traps and exclusion.

about.headline: Dallas's Family-Owned Pest Control Experts
about.mission: Our mission is to provide safe, effective, and affordable pest control that protects families and properties in Dallas.
story: Munoz Pest Control was founded in 1998 with a simple goal: deliver honest, high-quality pest control to our neighbors in Dallas. Starting with just a truck and a commitment to excellence, we have grown into a trusted provider serving thousands of homes and businesses across the metroplex.

Today, we remain family-owned and operated. Our team of certified technicians undergoes continuous training to stay ahead of the latest pest control innovations. We treat every home as if it were our own, ensuring thoroughness, respect, and lasting results.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say and stand behind our work.

coreValues.title: Excellence
coreValues.description: We pursue the highest standards in service and results.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your home and time with care.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We are proud to serve and support our Dallas community.

contact.headline: Get In Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to solve your pest problem? Contact us today for a free estimate.
